title: Moult PR risk gate report
description: Typed output contract for `moult gate`, the diff-aware PR risk gate. This is the ONLY Moult contract that renders a verdict: it consumes the confidence-graded / classified SIGNALS the other analyses emit (none of which carry pass/fail), scopes them to the changed lines/files (Clean as You Code), and applies an explicit, recorded policy. The verdict is an auditable application of that policy over confidence-graded candidates -- never a claim that code is certainly wrong or dead. No signal contract carries a verdict; it lives only here.

schema_version.description: Bumped only on a breaking change to this shape.

base_ref.description: The requested base ref the diff is taken against (e.g. "origin/main"). Null under scope "all".

merge_base.description: The resolved merge-base sha between base_ref and HEAD -- the "new code" boundary. Null under scope "all".

scope.description: "diff" gates only findings intersecting the changed lines/files; "all" gates the whole codebase.

components.description: Provenance: which signal analyses the gate composed, and which were skipped (errored or not applicable). Mirrors the health composer discipline.

policy.description: Every threshold that was applied, recorded in full so the verdict is reproducible and auditable.

source.description: "default" or the config file the overrides came from.

exclude_paths.description: Root-relative path prefixes dropped from gating (e.g. test/spec). The gate judges production code; override to [] to gate everything.

verdict.description: The single top-level outcome. The only pass/fail in any Moult contract.

reasons.description: Why the verdict came out the way it did.

failed.description: Evaluated rules that the changes violated.

findings.description: Total contributing findings across failed rules.

reason.description: One auditable note behind the verdict or a rule outcome.

diagnostic.description: Why it was skipped, when absent; null when present.

contribution.description: One finding that contributed to a rule outcome. Stays a confidence-graded / classified candidate: `value` is the observed signal, never an assertion of certainty.

symbol_id.description: Method-level join key ("<path>:<start_line>:<fqname>"), shared with the other contracts. Null where the finding is file-keyed (boundaries) or outside any method.

line.description: 1-based line of the finding, when known; null for file-keyed findings.

value.description: The observed signal that tripped the rule (a confidence, an ABC score, a clone mass, or a severity). A graded/classified value, never a certainty.

clone_group.description: Clone-group join key, "<kind>:<structural-hash>" where kind is identical|similar. Contributions sharing a value are occurrences of the same clone group. Stable within a report only. Null for non-duplication findings.

rule.description: One policy rule's outcome over the scoped changes.

evaluated.description: False when the backing analysis didn't run; such a rule never fails the gate.

observed.description: The worst observed value among scoped findings for this rule (max confidence/ABC/mass, or highest severity). Null when not evaluated or nothing was observed.

threshold.description: The applied threshold, rendered as a comparison (e.g. "< 0.8", "<= medium").

passed.description: Whether the changes satisfied the rule. Null when not evaluated.

findings.description: The contributing findings (empty when the rule passed or was skipped).
